styleGuide.visualDirection: Premium casual mobile game utility icon style, polished 2.5D sticker rendering, smooth anti-aliased edges, clean enamel-like highlights, warm gold-brown palette, high readability at tiny size.
mustHave: clean inner shading with subtle depth

assets.prompt: Create one clean premium hint icon in flat 2.5D style: a single rounded light-bulb silhouette, warm yellow glass, soft highlight, simple metallic base, one tiny ivory sparkle. Keep lines clean and minimal.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no letters, no abstract symbols, no black blobs, no black sparkle, no black filament, no checkerboard, no background plate, no glow ring, no mascot
assets.safeAreaHint: Keep all key shape detail inside center 70% area.
assets.readabilityHint: Must be instantly recognizable at 28-34 px.

assets.prompt: Create one clean premium undo icon: a single curved left-facing rollback arrow (head points left), thick readable stroke, warm cream-gold fill, dark-brown contour, subtle 2.5D highlight.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no dual arrows, no circular refresh loop, no black fill region, no cluttered effects, no dark gritty texture, no mascot
assets.safeAreaHint: Arrow head must remain clearly visible with roomy padding.
assets.readabilityHint: Direction should be obvious at a glance on small buttons.

assets.prompt: Create one premium shuffle/refresh icon: exactly two curved arrows forming a circular loop, both arrowheads crisp and obvious, balanced spacing, same polished material style and contour weight as hint and undo.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no gears, no abstract crosses, no single-arrow only, no face, no eyes, no mascot, no extra objects, no background plate
assets.safeAreaHint: Two-arrow loop centered, enough spacing to read both arrowheads.
assets.readabilityHint: Must read as reroll/refresh even at 28-34 px.
